logginginfo.description: Various letterboxing mask templates for 1080p (1920x1080). Templates include 1.33:1, 1.85:1, 2.35:1, 2.40:1, and many other commonly used (as well as many rarely used) letterboxed ratios. This product is a "Freebie" released by E. Hartford. For more "Freebies", check out www.ehartfordstudios.com/freebies.

clipitem.name: Fire Flames With Heavy Crackle Sound Effect.mp4
